# Aura Overview

AuraMaxx is a local credential agent and agent-safe secret runtime.

It helps you store secrets once, use them across CLI/UI/agents, and enforce least-privilege access by default.

## External docs entrypoint

- Start here: [HOW TO AURAMAXX](./HOW_TO_AURAMAXX/README.md)
- Main usage path: [SETUP](../../quickstart/AGENT_SETUP.md)

## 2-minute proof

```bash
npx aurawallet
npx aurawallet status
```

Then open `http://localhost:4747/`, create your agent, and add one credential.
